label: Options Chain
description: Options chain and volatility surface for the selected underlying. Shows calls, puts, greeks, and IV per strike.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: dynamic() loading fallbacks for both OptionsChain and VolSurfaceChart.

0.7.note: VolSurfaceChart renders 'No vol surface data'; OptionsChain shows 'No live data — displaying sample options chain'.

0.8.note: OptionsChain renders 'API unavailable — showing mock data' on isError.

1.3.note: Options chain is instrument-scoped market data — not org-filtered.

1.5.note: Instrument derived from selectedInstrument which is strategy-driven; options data itself is per-instrument.

1.6.note: Default instrument always set; options chain renders for it.

1.7.note: No reference data from lib/mocks in widget file; OptionsChain and VolSurfaceChart use their own mock generators internally (trading component layer — acceptable).

l1.notes: L1 pass. 1.3/1.4/1.5 N/A — instrument-scoped market data.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ (options chain fetches live data), batch — expected behavior: OptionsChain renders historical snapshot for asOf date if API supports it. paper N/A.

3.2.note: Widget passes selectedInstrument to OptionsChain/VolSurfaceChart but does not pass mode/asOf params. OptionsChain and VolSurfaceChart components would need to read mode internally or accept it as props. Gap identified.

3.5.note: Paper mode expected: read-only options chain view. No behavioral change needed.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or timed interval in widget file. Dynamically loaded components may have their own intervals — need human verification at component level.

l3.notes: Agent checks partial. 3.2 gap: mode/asOf not passed to OptionsChain/VolSurfaceChart sub-components. Human checks 3.3(N/A — read-only)/3.4(batch indicator) required.

4.1.note: No buttons in widget file — all interactivity inside OptionsChain and VolSurfaceChart components.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: All agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3(options form in OptionsChain)/4.4(option selection)/4.7(N/A)/4.8(scroll in overflow-auto) required.

5.1.note: Target strategies: options-specific strategies. In STRATEGIES registry: any strategy with assetClass including 'options' or 'cefi'. Currently no DeFi options strategies registered. Widget serves vanilla options trading workflow.

l5.notes: 5.1 complete. Human checks 5.2–5.6 required. Known L4 note: OptionsChain UNDERLYINGS constant may not match all selectedInstrument.symbol values — verify symbol passthrough.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 follows L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded colors in widget file. CLEAN.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file. CLEAN.

7.4.note: TerminalOptionsWidget PascalCase, useTerminalData useCamelCase, file kebab-case. CLEAN.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo in widget file. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. Widget file is a clean 40-line dynamic loader.

8.1.note: No text-[…] in widget file. CLEAN.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing in widget file. CLEAN.

8.3.note: No custom div+tailwind in widget file — delegates to OptionsChain and VolSurfaceChart trading components. CLEAN.

8.4.note: Agent: no img, input, interactive div in widget file. Human: keyboard + a11y check on OptionsChain and VolSurfaceChart components required (dynamically loaded).

8.5.note: Human check required — responsive at minW=4, minH=4. Dynamically loaded components must not overflow.

l8.notes: 8.1–8.3 clean in widget file. Human 8.4+8.5 required — critical because dynamic components may have their own typography/spacing issues.

keepSeparate.rationale: Options chain requires substantial height for strike table + vol surface. Cannot be merged with other terminal widgets without sacrificing usability.

relationships.notes: Driven by selectedInstrument from terminal-watchlist. Dynamically loads OptionsChain and VolSurfaceChart to avoid SSR issues with chart libraries.

dataContract.mockSource: options-chain/mock-generators.tsx (UNDERLYINGS constant + synthetic options generation inside OptionsChain component)
dataContract.backendOwner: unknown — likely unified-trading-api (options pricing / vol surface service)
dataContract.notes: OptionsChain fetches options data via internal hook; VolSurfaceChart generates synthetic vol surface. Production path requires options pricing service. Both sub-components handle their own loading/error states.

gaps: DeFi options protocols (Lyra, Dopex, Premia) not verified
OptionsChain UNDERLYINGS constant may not match all instrument symbols passed by terminal context
Vol surface is fully synthetic — not backed by real implied volatility data
coverage.notes: Currently CeFi-only. DeFi options protocols are a significant gap. OptionsChain has a hardcoded UNDERLYINGS list that may not react correctly to selectedInstrument.symbol if the symbol is not in the list.

knownIssues: OptionsChain UNDERLYINGS constant hardcoded — does not react to selectedInstrument.symbol if symbol not in list (L4 human walkthrough required)
Vol surface is synthetic, not real IV data
mode/asOf not passed to OptionsChain/VolSurfaceChart sub-components (3.2 partial)

findings.description: terminal-options-widget.tsx — no user-visible strings in widget file; all in dynamically loaded sub-components
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
